question: What was decided about the worker MPM thread limit?

snippets.claim_text: Greg Stein proposes raising worker MPM ThreadsPerChild default from 25 to 64
snippets.excerpt:
Current default is 25. Modern hardware easily handles 64.
This would affect httpd-worker MPM component.
Vote: +1

snippets.claim_text: Justin supports raising ThreadsPerChild to 64, citing BZ-12310 benchmark data
snippets.excerpt: +1. Benchmark data supports this. See BZ-12310.

snippets.claim_text: ThreadsPerChild decision targets the worker MPM component
snippets.excerpt: This would affect httpd-worker MPM component.

citations.subject: [VOTE] Worker MPM: raise default ThreadsPerChild to 64
Re: [VOTE] Worker MPM: raise default ThreadsPerChild to 64
